---
title: \{SET\}
subtitle: Project Management
author: Kyle P Messier
date:  "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  rmdformats::readthedown:
    self_contained: true
    thumbnails: true
    lightbox: true
    gallery: false
    highlight: tango
    toc: 1
  pdf_document:
    toc: yes=
    toc_depth: '2'    
---


## Github Repositories


## Github Projects
